name: Huaku Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Huaku Development Co., Ltd. constructs, leases, and sells public housings and commercial buildings in Taiwan and China. The company also engages in the leasing and sale of general-purpose plants and warehouses; and contracting of civil and hydraulic engineering projects. The company was formerly known as Huaku Construction Co., Ltd. Huaku Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
